strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Strong software craftsmanship discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, observability mindset
concerns: No evidence of executive-level leadership or scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+ people
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth; pricing work at Optilyz is adjacent but not credit/risk/trade decisioning
Production multi-agent AI systems experience appears nascent rather than demonstrated at scale
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with broad polyglot experience, strong engineering discipline, and early exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the resume shows IC and senior-developer roles rather than executive leadership scaling teams or owning architecture in regulated fintech. Core CTO-level requirements — production multi-agent systems at scale, fintech credit/risk infrastructure, and growing a 30+ person organization — are not substantiated.
